member.name: T:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.ChatRole
member.summary: Role in a chat conversation for LLM services.

member.name: T:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.ChatMessage
member.summary: A message in a chat conversation.

member.name: M:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.ChatMessage.#ctor(Easydict.Llm.Streaming.ChatRole,System.String)
member.summary: A message in a chat conversation.

member.name: P:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.ChatMessage.RoleString
member.summary: Get the role as a string for API requests.

member.name: T:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.SseParser
member.summary: Parses Server-Sent Events (SSE) for OpenAI chat completions streaming format. Handles: data: {"choices":[{"delta":{"content":"..."}}]} and [DONE]

member.name: M:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.SseParser.ParseStreamAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Parse SSE stream and yield content chunks.
member.param: HTTP response stream containing SSE data.
member.returns: Async enumerable of content strings extracted from SSE events.

member.name: M:Easydict.Llm.Streaming.SseParser.ExtractContent(System.String)
member.summary: Extract content from OpenAI chat completion delta JSON. Expected format: {"choices":[{"delta":{"content":"text"}}]}
